basic_details.job_title: Panjab University Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Panjab University Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Notification 2026 has been released on the official website puchd.ac.in. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the Panjab University Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc. in Chemistry/Physics/Material Science or related disciplines, M.Tech/M.E in Chemical/Biochemical/Biotechnology Engg./ Materials/ Nanotechnology or equivalent degrees
qualification.details: M.Sc. in Chemistry/Physics/Material Science or related disciplines OR M.Tech/M.E in Chemical/Biochemical/Biotechnology Engg./ Materials/ Nanotechnology or equivalent degrees. Desirable: Candidates having a valid CSIR/UGC-NET or GATE scorecard. Desirable: Candidates having experience in Physical & Chemical analysis, AI (coding) and instrumentation.

salary_details.details: Rs.35,000/- per month including HRA or Rs.31,000/- per month (availing hostel facility)

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 24-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Panjab University JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) posts at Panjab University is 24th June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance of the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position in the Panjab University recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the JRF post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M.Sc. in Chemistry/Physics/Material Science or related disciplines, or an M.Tech/M.E in Chemical/Biochemical/Biotechnology Engg./ Materials/ Nanotechnology or equivalent degrees.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) post is 35 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the JRF post?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a monthly salary ranging from Rs. 31,000 to Rs. 35,000, which may include HRA or be adjusted if hostel facilities are availed.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the Panjab University Junior Research Fellow (JRF) recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the form and submit it via post.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for the JRF posts?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) posts in this recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) posts will involve shortlisting of eligible candidates followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of Panjab University. Links are provided in the "Important Links" section of this article.

faq.question: Q10. What are the desirable qualifications for the JRF post?
faq.answer: Desirable qualifications include a valid CSIR/UGC-NET or GATE scorecard, and experience in Physical & Chemical analysis, AI (coding), and instrumentation.
